title: Setup Volunteer Help Desk
description: Organize the desk outside the 100m perimeter with the printed electoral roll and search tools.

title: Morning Turnout Reporting
description: Estimate the number of voters in the queue at 9 AM and submit a quick turnout report.

title: Distribute Voter Awareness Pamphlets
description: Hand out informational pamphlets in the local market to encourage high voter turnout.

title: Distribute Volunteer Badges
description: Hand out official volunteer ID badges and caps to the team arriving for the morning shift.

title: Coordinate Elderly Transport
description: Call and confirm pickup times for senior citizens who requested transport assistance.

title: Assist First-time Voters
description: Help guide young voters through the identification process before they enter the booth.

title: Check Booth Accessibility
description: Ensure the wheelchair ramps are clear and adequate lighting is functional before polling begins.

title: Check Booth Accessibility
description: Ensure the wheelchair ramps are clear and adequate lighting is functional before polling begins.

title: Door-to-door Voter Verification
description: Cross-check voter list details for households in the assigned block and identify missing names.

title: Identify Missing Voters
description: Review the provided list of absent/shifted/dead (ASD) voters and verify with neighbors.

title: Verify EPIC Card Details
description: Assist voters who lost their slips by looking up their EPIC numbers in the digital roll.

title: Post-poll Area Cleanup
description: Help clear any campaign materials and dismantle the volunteer desk after voting concludes.

title: Manage Parking Congestion
description: Guide vehicles away from the immediate vicinity of the polling station to prevent traffic jams.

title: Voter Mobilization Drives
description: Call local supporters in the afternoon to remind them to cast their votes before the booth closes.
